target.description: Clean up all that are generated
target.name: cleanall

target.description: Instrument the example subject NanoXML with Diver
target.name: diver_inst

arg.line: -w -cp .:../mcia_release/libs/polyglot.jar:../mcia_release/libs/rt.jar:../mcia_release/libs/sootclasses-2.3.0.jar:../mcia_release/libs/java_cup.jar:../mcia_release/libs/jasminclasses-2.3.0.jar:../mcia_release/libs/duaf.jar:../mcia_release/bin:../Nano.tdv1/bin:../NanoXML/bin -p cg verbose:true,implicit-entry:false -p cg.spark verbose:true,on-fly-cg:true,rta:true -f c -d diverInstrumented -brinstr:off -duainstr:off -dumpJimple -slicectxinsens -interCD -intraCD -ignoreRTECD -exInterCD -serializeVTG -wrapTryCatch -allowphantom -main-class AllDriversMain -entry:AllDriversMain -process-dir ../Nano.tdv1/bin -process-dir ../NanoXML/bin

target.description: Instrument the example subject NanoXML with EAS
target.name: eas_inst

arg.line: -w -cp .:../mcia_release/libs/polyglot.jar:../mcia_release/libs/rt.jar:../mcia_release/libs/sootclasses-2.3.0.jar:../mcia_release/libs/java_cup.jar:../mcia_release/libs/jasminclasses-2.3.0.jar:../mcia_release/libs/duaf.jar:../mcia_release/bin:../Nano.tdv1/bin:../NanoXML/bin -p cg verbose:true,implicit-entry:false -p cg.spark verbose:true,on-fly-cg:true,rta:true -f c -d easInstrumented -brinstr:off -duainstr:off -dumpJimple -slicectxinsens -dumpFunctionList -wrapTryCatch -allowphantom -main-class AllDriversMain -entry:AllDriversMain -process-dir ../Nano.tdv1/bin -process-dir ../NanoXML/bin

target.description: Run EAS-instrumented code to produce method traces used by EAS
target.name: eas_run

target.description: Run Diver-instrumented code to produce method traces used by Diver
target.name: diver_run

target.description: Get the impact set of an example query from Diver
target.name: diver_query

target.description: Get the impact set of an example query from EAS
target.name: eas_query
